title: A Composer’s Guide to Game Music
creator: Winifred Phillips
description: A working composer’s introduction to the artistic, technical, and professional demands of game music, including interactivity, workflow, collaboration, pitching, and career development.
useful: It explains what makes composing for games different from writing a linear score while remaining accessible to newcomers.
audience: Composers and audio students considering interactive music or their first game collaboration.
learning: Understand common production and career expectations
